title: Motor Recipe v1
description: Executable contract for one type of governed job. A recipe is not a prompt: it declares trigger, authority, sandbox, budgets, verification, promotion, rollback, and the receipt it must produce. Recipes are founder-gated artifacts (L5 territory): changing verification, authority, or budgets requires founder approval of the diff.

recipe_id.description: Stable identity, e.g. NF-MOTOR-WEB-PUBLISH-001. Never reused for a different purpose.

version.description: Semver. Any change to verification/authority/budgets is at least a minor bump and founder-gated.

purpose.description: One or two sentences: what business outcome a run of this recipe produces.

type.description: What is allowed to start a job of this recipe. A recipe with type=schedule is an autorun.

dedupe_key.description: Template for the idempotency key so the same trigger never creates two jobs (L13). Required + non-empty on every recipe so a job's idempotency_key always has a template to render.

required_inputs.description: Inputs a job instance must bind before EXECUTING. Missing input = job invalid at creation, not discovered mid-run.

machine_may.description: Closed allowlist of machine actions. Anything not listed is denied.

founder_required.description: Actions that hard-stop the job into AWAITING_AUTHORITY. Merge and production promotion live here unless explicitly machine-safe.

escalation_route.description: Where the job goes when it needs authority it doesn't have (e.g. 'founder-decision issue in sandbox-private').

model.description: Model tier if the worker is model-backed; omit for deterministic workers.

workers.description: Bounded workers the Motor may assign. Worker output is a proposal, never a transition (L13/D-rules).

type.description: none_readonly is valid only for witness/observe recipes that never mutate anything.

production_write.description: Always false. Production is reached only via promotion, never from inside the sandbox. This field exists so the invariant is machine-checkable.

filesystem_scope.description: Paths the worker may touch. Empty = repo default.

secret_scope.description: Named secrets minted for the job, least privilege. Never production deploy keys.

value_class.description: Default value_class for cost attribution in cycle receipts (L11).

action.description: Concrete action, not intent. 'Run pytest -q' not 'ensure quality'.

steps.description: The bounded execution plan. Steps outside this list require a recipe version bump, not improvisation.

external.description: True = probe the building worker does not control (L4).

external_proof_required.description: True for any recipe whose outcome is observable outside the sandbox (deploys, publishes). PASS without an external:true check passing = INVALID.

verifier_freeze_note.default: Verifiers and pass criteria are founder-gated (L5). A failing job fixes the system, never the check.
verifier_freeze_note.description: Constant reminder; kept in the schema so every recipe carries it.

on_check_fail.description: repair_and_retry is bounded by budgets.retries; then escalate.

repair_scope.description: What the machine may change while repairing. Verifiers are never in scope (L5).

gate_point.description: before_promotion is the default for anything that touches production.

approval_evidence.description: What counts as approval: e.g. 'founder merge of the PR', 'founder comment /approve on the decision issue'. Verbal approval without artifact = not approval.

mutation_policy.description: Per-surface mutation authority. Resolves the 'read-only recipe that still writes a diagnosis receipt' contradiction: a witness/diagnose recipe denies mutation of the OBSERVED system and production business state, while still being allowed append-only control-plane receipts and create-only routing rows. 'Read-only' means read-only with respect to the observed/production system, never literally zero writes. Absent = strictest interpretation (all deny except sandbox filesystem).

observed_system.description: The system under observation/repair. Witness recipes: deny.

production_business_state.description: Customer/production data. Almost always deny outside a founder-gated promotion.

runtime.description: Process/service runtime. deny for evidence-path repair (restart is founder-gated elsewhere).

evidence_sink.description: Receipt/evidence tables. Diagnose: append_only. Receipt-writer-repair: full (receipts table only).

control_plane_receipts.description: Diagnosis receipts, cockpit state. Diagnose: append_only.

routing_queue.description: Issue/queue rows for routing. Diagnose: create_only.

sandbox_filesystem.description: The disposable sandbox worktree. Builders: full; witness: deny.

condition.description: E.g. 'founder_approval AND all verification checks PASS'.

clean_sha_required.description: Deploys run from a clean committed SHA (L6).

post_promotion_checks.description: External observations proving the promotion landed: deployed SHA match, canonical URL content markers, ≥60s after deploy (L4).

command.description: The actual command or workflow, pre-written, not composed during the incident.

machine_may_rollback.description: Whether rollback is machine-safe or founder-gated for this recipe.

schema_ref.description: Points at the job-record schema, normally 'noetfield/motor-job-v1'.

required_fields.description: Fields that must be non-null before the job may enter RECEIPT_COMPLETE. Cost fields are always required (L11).

storage.description: Where receipts persist. In-repo or shared sink, never home directories (L6/L10).
